zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth於大約1340年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾考維時，他的父親William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris23歲，母親Margaret Moray26歲。他於1375年與Joanna Ross在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1410年在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth于大约1340年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾考維时，他的父亲William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris23岁，母亲Margaret Moray26岁。他于1375年与Joanna Ross在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1410年在英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser

variants.name: Frasier

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth was born about 1340, in Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Moray, was 26. He married Joanna Ross in 1375, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1410, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth est né environ 1340, à Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Moray, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Ross en 1375, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1410, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth um 1340 in Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Moray 26. Er hat 1375 in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland Joanna Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth è nato il circa 1340 nel Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Moray, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Ross nel 1375, nel Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1410, nel Kirkcudbrightshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorthが約1340年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアコウィで生まれた時，父William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durrisは23歳，母Margaret Morayは26歳であった。1375年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイでJoanna Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1410年にイギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth(이)가 대략 1340년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 코위에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Moray(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1375년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 Joanna Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1410년 영국 스코틀랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Moray, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Ross em 1375, em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1410, em Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth родился около 1340 г. в местности коуи, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Moray, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Ross в 1375 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Fraser of Cowie and Durris - 1st of Philorth nació aproximadamente 1340, en Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Moray, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Joanna Ross en 1375, en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1410, en Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
